File: swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lsp_server.rs (45.9%, 33 uncovered lines)

Uncovered functions:
- `LspServerConfig::default()` (lines 28-35): trivial but counted
- `start_lsp_server()` (lines 93-131): unsupported language path, spawn success/failure
- `spawn_server()` (lines 151-234): executable-not-found-but-in-PATH path, process spawn and immediate exit detection, both branches (exists vs PATH lookup)

Tests needed:
- Test start_lsp_server with unsupported language
- Test spawn_server with nonexistent executable
- Test find_executable (already partially covered)

Acceptance: coverage >= 65% for lsp_server.rs
Test LSP server spawn and detection paths
